name: Staclar Global Cache
notes:
We do not use PNIs smaller than 1GE.

1GE PNIs are available in the following datacenters:
- Accelerated Werkhaus

10GE PNIs are available in the following datacenters:
- Accelerated Werkhaus
- Interxion Frankfurt

We will peer with everyone on exchanges per request and most route servers. We will NOT peer with remote participants if we share a more local interconnection point or latency to the remote endpoint is lower via transit via any Staclar Global Cache Node.

**Prefix announcements may differ per-region, per-exchange and even per-peer due to performance optimizations and may change regularly. Only send traffic to the prefixes announced to you and never set up static routes for any of our prefixes.**
